name: servicequote-ai
description: ServiceQuote AI — turn job notes into editable line-item estimates and branded proposals for US service contractors.

scripts.db:migrate: echo 'Run the SQL files in supabase/migrations against your Supabase project in order (0001..0006). See docs/SUPABASE_SETUP.md.'
scripts.db:seed: echo 'Run supabase/seed/demo.sql (after migrations), or use the in-app Demo data button. See docs/DEMO_SCRIPT.md.'
scripts.db:types: echo 'Optional: supabase gen types typescript --project-id <id> --schema public > src/lib/types/supabase.ts. Types are hand-authored in src/lib/types/db.ts.'
scripts.seed:demo: echo 'Sign in, then use the Demo data button on the dashboard, or run supabase/seed/demo.sql. See docs/DEMO_SCRIPT.md.'
